# Typescript

Prefer typescript over javascript
Prefer types over interfaces
Store types in their own *.types.ts files along side the area where they are most relevant - usually the context file
Do NOT use any as a type
prefer arrow functions over function declarations

This project uses bootstrap and react-bootstrap for styling.When building component Prefer the react-bootstrap components
use react-bootstrap-icons for icons

If custom css is needed, add a css file next to the component file with the same name, prefer no inline styling
